title: Senior Software Engineer
description: We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our platform team. You will design and build scalable backend services using Python and Go. Responsibilities include leading technical design reviews, mentoring junior engineers, and collaborating cross-functionally with product managers and designers. Strong experience with distributed systems, microservices, and cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP) is required. You should be comfortable working in a fast-paced environment and driving projects from conception to production.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Join our research team to develop cutting-edge ML models for natural language understanding. You will work on training large-scale transformer models, building data pipelines, and deploying models to production using MLflow and Kubernetes. Experience with PyTorch, TensorFlow, and distributed training is essential. A background in NLP, computer vision, or reinforcement learning is a strong plus. You will collaborate with world-class researchers and engineers to push the boundaries of AI.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: We are a fast-growing startup looking for a Full Stack Developer who can work across our entire technology stack. You will build features in React and Next.js on the frontend and Node.js or Python on the backend. You should have experience with PostgreSQL, Redis, and Docker. Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, GitHub Actions, and cloud deployments is expected. We value clean code, thorough testing, and strong communication skills in a remote-first environment.

title: Data Scientist
description: Analytics Plus is hiring a Data Scientist to drive business insights through advanced statistical modeling and machine learning. You will work closely with stakeholders to define KPIs, design experiments, and build predictive models. Proficiency in Python (Pandas, Scikit-learn, XGBoost), SQL, and data visualization tools (Tableau, Matplotlib) is required. Experience with A/B testing, causal inference, or time-series forecasting is highly desirable.

title: AI Product Manager
description: We are seeking an AI Product Manager to lead the development of our next-generation AI-powered products. You will work with engineering, research, and design teams to define product vision, create roadmaps, and ship impactful features. A technical background in ML/AI is strongly preferred. You should be able to translate complex AI capabilities into clear user value, manage stakeholders, and use data to guide product decisions. Experience with LLMs, recommendation systems, or AI assistants is a big plus.

title: Backend Python Developer
description: CloudBase Systems is looking for a Backend Python Developer to join our infrastructure team. You will build and maintain RESTful APIs and async services using FastAPI and Django. Strong knowledge of SQL (PostgreSQL) and NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Redis) is required. You should be comfortable with Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS services. Code quality, performance optimization, and security best practices are central to our engineering culture.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: InfraScale is hiring a DevOps Engineer to manage and scale our cloud infrastructure on AWS. You will automate deployments using Terraform and Ansible, manage Kubernetes clusters, and build robust CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins and GitHub Actions. Strong Linux administration, networking, and monitoring skills (Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog) are essential. Experience with security hardening and cost optimization in cloud environments is a plus.

title: NLP Research Scientist
description: LanguageAI is on a mission to make communication smarter. We are hiring an NLP Research Scientist to advance our core language models. You will design and implement novel NLP architectures, conduct research experiments, publish findings, and collaborate with the engineering team on productionization. A PhD or strong publication record in NLP, linguistics, or ML is preferred. Deep expertise with transformers, BERT, GPT-style models, and fine-tuning techniques is required.

title: Frontend React Developer
description: UIFlow is looking for a creative Frontend React Developer to build beautiful, responsive web applications. You will work closely with our design team to implement pixel-perfect UIs using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Experience with state management (Redux, Zustand), testing (Jest, React Testing Library), and performance optimization is required. You should be passionate about user experience and accessibility standards.

title: Cybersecurity Engineer
description: SecureNet is seeking a Cybersecurity Engineer to protect our clients' critical infrastructure. Responsibilities include conducting penetration testing, vulnerability assessments, and threat modeling. You will design and implement security controls, respond to incidents, and develop security policies. Experience with SIEM tools, firewalls, IAM, and compliance frameworks (SOC2, ISO 27001, NIST) is required. Certifications such as CISSP, CEH, or OSCP are highly valued.

title: Cloud Solutions Architect
description: NexaCloud is looking for a Cloud Solutions Architect to design robust, cost-effective cloud architectures for enterprise clients. You will lead technical discovery sessions, create architecture diagrams, and guide implementation teams. Deep expertise in AWS or Azure, including serverless, containers, networking, and data services, is required. Strong communication skills to present complex solutions to executive stakeholders are essential. AWS Solutions Architect Professional or Azure Solutions Expert certification preferred.

title: Python AI Engineer
description: IntelliBot is building the next generation of AI-powered automation tools. We need a Python AI Engineer to develop LLM-based agents, integrate OpenAI APIs, and build production-grade pipelines. You should have strong Python skills, experience with LangChain or similar frameworks, and understand prompt engineering, RAG architectures, and vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, FAISS). Experience deploying AI services on AWS or GCP is required.

title: Mobile Developer (iOS/Android)
description: AppWave is hiring a Mobile Developer to build high-quality apps for iOS and Android using React Native or Flutter. You will collaborate with designers and backend engineers to deliver smooth, intuitive mobile experiences. Experience with native modules, push notifications, offline storage, and app store deployment is required. Passion for mobile UX and performance optimization is a must.

title: Data Engineer
description: DataStream is hiring a Data Engineer to build and maintain scalable data pipelines and warehouses. You will design ETL/ELT processes using Apache Spark, Airflow, and dbt. Strong SQL and Python skills are required. Experience with cloud data warehouses (Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift) and streaming platforms (Kafka, Kinesis) is highly desirable. You will work closely with data scientists and analysts to ensure high-quality, reliable data.

title: Software Engineer – AI Integrations
description: SmartWork AI is looking for a Software Engineer with a focus on AI integrations to help build our suite of productivity tools. You will integrate LLMs into existing workflows, develop custom agents, and build APIs that connect AI capabilities with enterprise systems. Python is our primary language, but experience with JavaScript/TypeScript is a bonus. Familiarity with OpenAI, Anthropic, or Hugging Face APIs is required. You should be excited about the future of work and AI-driven automation.
